scope.summary: H3 adds version-neutral field-hardening release and migration notes for the current oraclemcp-091 train, with operator actions and an explicit unresolved-version warning.
out_of_scope: No release tag, publication, version metadata change, or CHANGELOG version decision is made.
No live Oracle, browser, dashboard, IAM, OAuth, pool, or catalog code behavior is changed by this docs close.
Driver-side release notes remain dependent on the final driver release decision and are not authored from the sibling rust-oracledb checkout.

entry_points.name: field-hardening release and migration notes
entry_points.trace: docs/oraclemcp-091-field-hardening-notes.md covers the tracker train name `oraclemcp-091-train-root-jp5k9`, flags the unresolved 0.9.1-vs-0.10.0 version label and bead `788nn`, and records operator actions for A1a/A1e catalog visibility, A3a/A3b flashback preflight/quarantine asymmetry, A4a/A4e pool/session lifecycle, A5 dashboard fetch-first security contract, P-U3 dashboard 403 ErrorEnvelope behavior, B7c explicit close, B16a/B16b IAM TokenSource and doctor observation, SEC-6 uniform OAuth rejection, SEC-1 recovery reclassification, B11 response caps, and P-U5 wallet truth table.

entry_points.name: release-surface links
entry_points.trace: README.md links the field-hardening operator notes from the existing operator-note section, and docs/release-checklist.md requires attaching the notes while resolving their version-label ambiguity before tagging.

entry_points.name: release-doc regression test
entry_points.trace: `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/home/durakovic/projects/oraclemcp/target/cod_6_h3 cargo test -p oraclemcp --test release_docs` exited 0 after a fresh compile: 3 passed, 0 failed, 0 ignored. The first inherited-target attempt was refused by the build guard because CARGO_TARGET_DIR pointed at /home/durakovic/.cache/cargo-target; the passing run used a checkout-local target subdirectory.

entry_points.name: format and staged discipline
entry_points.trace: `cargo fmt --all -- --check`, `scripts/swarm_discipline.sh struct-atomicity --staged`, `scripts/swarm_discipline.sh stale-delete-check --staged`, and `git diff --cached --check` all exited 0 before commit.

entry_points.name: landed source
entry_points.trace: `git show --stat HEAD` for 454ed0fd reported exactly README.md, crates/oraclemcp/tests/release_docs.rs, docs/oraclemcp-091-field-hardening-notes.md, and docs/release-checklist.md changed: 247 insertions, 5 deletions.

limitations: This is documentation and release-process evidence only; it does not re-run the live lanes closed by the beads it documents.
The version label remains intentionally unresolved; the notes direct the operator to resolve bead `788nn` before tagging or publishing.
No full workspace cargo gate is claimed from this shared checkout.
follow_ups: Resolve bead `788nn` before release tagging so the final public version label is unambiguous.
